recommendation_map.A1: Add FAQPage schema (JSON-LD) for Q&A content.
recommendation_map.A2: Add HowTo schema for step-by-step or instructional content.
recommendation_map.A3: Use direct-answer phrasing (e.g. "The X is Y", "You can...") in key paragraphs.
recommendation_map.A4: Add bullet or numbered lists for scannable answers.
recommendation_map.A5: Add tables for comparative or factual data.
recommendation_map.A6: Break content into concise paragraphs (under 50 words) for snippet extraction.
recommendation_map.A7: Use exactly one H1 and logical heading hierarchy (H2, H3).
recommendation_map.A8: Keep title between 40 and 60 characters for answer snippets.
recommendation_map.A9: Provide a meta description of at least 150 characters.
recommendation_map.A10: Align entity names (brand, product) across schema and visible content.
recommendation_map.A11: Reduce ambiguous or vague terms for clearer entity extraction.
recommendation_map.A12: Back factual claims with structured data or clear specs.
recommendation_map.A13: Include question-and-answer style content for voice and featured snippets.
recommendation_map.A14: Ensure mobile-friendly layout and viewport for voice assistants.
recommendation_map.A15: Add explicit Q&A or specs that answer common queries.
